programs.title: When Love Came to Town
programs.desc: Abby is a famous author whose latest stop on her book tour takes her to the town of Bliss. But little does she know that the locals are keen to play matchmaker for her. Lauren Holly stars. (2014)

programs.title: Love At First Dance
programs.desc: Hope is tasked with teaching Manhattan's most eligible bachelor how to dance ahead of his society wedding. Will their blossoming student-teacher relationship ultimately jeopardise the wedding? (2018)

programs.title: Love's Complicated
programs.desc: (2016) Rom-com with Holly Marie Combs. People pleaser Leah is enrolled in a conflict management class with her nemesis, shock jock Cinco Dublin. Will the pair learn to see eye to eye?

programs.title: The Movie Star and the Cowboy
programs.desc: (2022) Romance starring MacKenzie Porter and Toby Levins. Actress Isabella is desperate to land her dream role as a rancher - but will learning the ropes in Montana also land her a leading man?

programs.title: Valentine Ever After
programs.desc: Keen to escape the big city, Julia and Sydney head to Wyoming for a fun getaway. However, the trip sees Julia re-evaluate her life choices, including her career and the man she truly loves. (2016)

programs.title: Valentine In The Vineyard
programs.desc: With the sound of impending wedding bells in the air, Frankie and Nate start to question their compatibility as a couple. Rachael Lee Cook stars. (2019)
